        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Ukraine's ex-energy minister detained while attempting to leave country]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[His detention comes as he faces legal proceedings after being dismissed in a corruption scandal.]]></description>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[FBI analysing recovered glove that appears to match those worn in Guthrie suspect video]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[The FBI says it recovered the sample from the glove, which was found in a field a few miles from Guthrie's home.]]></description>
            <link>https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5yrv2g16e2o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss</link>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Iran ready to discuss compromises to reach nuclear deal, minister tells BBC in Tehran]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[Majid Takht-Ravanchi, Iran's deputy foreign minister, tells the BBC's Lyse Doucet that the ball was "in America's court to prove that they want to do a deal".]]></description>
            <link>https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clyz4y3zwz5o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss</link>
            <guid isPermaLink="false">https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clyz4y3zwz5o#0</guid>

        </item>
        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Eleven killed in Israeli strikes on Gaza, rescuers say]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[The Palestinian Red Crescent say a strike on a tent encampment in northern Gaza killed at least six people.]]></description>
            <link>https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8r15eyvk2do?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss</link>

        </item>
        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Russia killed opposition leader Alexei Navalny using dart frog toxin, UK says]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[There is no innocent explanation for the toxin being found in samples taken from Navalny's body, Foreign Office says.]]></description>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Rubio says US and Europe 'belong together' despite tensions]]></title>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Russian 'pick-up artist' accused of secretly filming women in Ghana]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[Ghana has called on Russia to extradite the man, who is accused of recording sexual encounters without consent.]]></description>

            <title><![CDATA[US boards second tanker in Indian Ocean after tracking it from Caribbean ]]></title>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Motorbike raids on villages kill dozens in Nigeria]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[Armed men shot locals dead, set homes alight and abducted an "undetermined" number of people in Niger State.]]></description>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Hundreds of thousands join Iran protests around the world]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[Munich, Los Angeles, and Toronto saw the largest crowds, with smaller rallies also taking place in Tel Aviv and Libson. ]]></description>

            <title><![CDATA[China confirms visa-free travel for UK and Canadian nationals]]></title>

            <title><![CDATA[Police wear fancy dress in Rio Carnival phone theft sting]]></title>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Obama addresses racist video shared by Trump depicting him as an ape]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[The former US president didn't name Trump, but lamented the lack of "shame" and "decorum" among public officials. ]]></description>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[No arrests made after police search residence near Nancy Guthrie's home]]></title>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Cuban cigar festival called off as US blockade worsens energy crisis]]></title>
            <description><![CDATA[The annual aficionados' bonanza has been postponed until further notice as shortages affect international travel.]]></description>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Planned US-funded baby vaccine trial in Guinea-Bissau blasted by WHO]]></title>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Casey Wasserman to sell talent agency after Epstein fallout]]></title>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[What is the dart frog toxin allegedly used to kill Alexei Navalny?]]></title>

        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[The spectacular multimillion-euro heist nobody noticed]]></title>

            <title><![CDATA['Trump will be gone in three years': Top Democrats try to reassure Europe]]></title>

            <title><![CDATA[After the landslide: Can India reset ties with a BNP-led Bangladesh?]]></title>

            <title><![CDATA[Gisèle Pelicot tells BBC: I felt crushed by horror - but I don't feel anger]]></title>
